error.default_config_enabled: default_config is enabled in configuration.yaml. Unable to manage integrations.
error.advanced_warning: Advanced mode allows disabling default_config integrations. Use with caution.

data_description.mode_dropdown: Default Config Manager is missing from configuration.yaml. Add `default_config_manager:` to enable management.
Default Config Manager is missing. Please remove `default_config:` and add `default_config_manager:` in your configuration.yaml to enable management.
Both `default_config:` and `default_config_manager:` are enabled. Please remove `default_config:` from configuration.yaml to enable management.
Default Config Manager is managing default integrations.

disclaimer.title: Advanced Mode Warning
disclaimer.description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** Advanced mode allows you to disable core components. Misconfiguration can break your dashboards or cause system instability.

Please confirm you want to proceed.

data.acknowledge: I understand the risks and wish to enable Advanced Mode.

revert_basic.title: Revert to Managed Mode
revert_basic.description:
You are switching back to Managed Mode. Any default integrations you previously disabled will be automatically re-enabled.

Click Submit to confirm and save your changes.

error.must_acknowledge: You must check the box to confirm you understand the risks before saving.

missing_yaml.title: Missing Configuration
missing_yaml.description: Please add `default_config_manager:` to your configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant to enable management.

restart_required.title: Restart Required
restart_required.description: Changes to Default Config integrations have been detected. A restart is required for these changes to take effect.

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to restart Home Assistant to apply changes?
